# mpindex

Estimate **Multidimensional Poverty Index (MPI)** measures from
household survey microdata using the [Alkire-Foster dual-cutoff counting
method](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jpubeco.2010.11.006). Load your
indicator specification from a CSV, Excel, JSON, or plain-text file;
compute the headcount ratio (H), intensity (A), and MPI = H × A;
disaggregate by any subgroup; and export results to a formatted Excel
report. Complex survey designs — stratification, clustering, and
probability weights — are supported out of the box, with optional
design-based standard errors and confidence intervals.

Learn more in
[`vignette("mpindex")`](https://yng-me.github.io/mpindex/articles/mpindex.md)
and
[`?compute_mpi`](https://yng-me.github.io/mpindex/reference/compute_mpi.md).

> **Upgrading from 0.2.x?** See the [migration
> guide](https://yng-me.github.io/mpindex/articles/migrating-to-0-3-0.html)
> for a full list of breaking changes and before/after examples.

## Installation

To install the `mpindex` package from CRAN:

``` r

install.packages('mpindex')
```

If you want to get the latest development version of `mpindex`, install
it from GitHub. Note that you may need to install `devtools`.

``` r

# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github('yng-me/mpindex')
```

## Usage

Load the package once you have successfully completed the installation.

``` r

library(mpindex)
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`compute_mpi()`](https://yng-me.github.io/mpindex/reference/compute_mpi.md)
  : Compute Multidimensional Poverty Index (MPI)

- [`define_deprivation()`](https://yng-me.github.io/mpindex/reference/define_deprivation.md)
  : Define deprivation cutoffs

- [`define_mpi_specs()`](https://yng-me.github.io/mpindex/reference/define_mpi_specs.md)
  : Define MPI specifications: dimensions, indicators, and weights

- [`deprived()`](https://yng-me.github.io/mpindex/reference/deprived.md)
  :

  Specify a deprivation cutoff for use in `compute_mpi`

- [`df_household`](https://yng-me.github.io/mpindex/reference/df_household.md)
  : Sample dataset of households

- [`df_household_roster`](https://yng-me.github.io/mpindex/reference/df_household_roster.md)
  : Sample dataset of household members

- [`global_mpi_specs()`](https://yng-me.github.io/mpindex/reference/global_mpi_specs.md)
  : Load the built-in Global MPI specification

- [`save_mpi()`](https://yng-me.github.io/mpindex/reference/save_mpi.md)
  : Save MPI output

- [`use_global_mpi_specs()`](https://yng-me.github.io/mpindex/reference/use_global_mpi_specs.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** : Use Global MPI specification
